name: Big Hero 6 - RPG [ALT Version]
description:
School life and superhero work...what's the balance between the two?

Welp, people asked for a version where Hiro and Tadashi are revelent story wise(Tadashi is still dead though) So yeah, Don't worry if you perfered them not in the story the other Big Hero 6 bot is still up

  • Hiro
